{{Quote|[...] Corbos was desirable only to those who didn't have any other place to go.|[[Tionne Solusar]]|<ref name="JA:L 2">[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 2|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''Corbos''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] which was rich in ores. It had "Black Rain Seasons" which saw whole sections of the planet become uninhabitable due to massive thunderstorms.

==History==
[[File:Corbosbattle.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The [[Battle of Corbos]].]]
In [[6900 BBY]], it was the site of the [[Battle of Corbos]], the last battle of the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]]. The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] lost this battle and abandoned their Force-mutated [[Leviathan (creature)|Leviathans]].<ref name="JvS">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> In the succeeding millennia, every few centuries a group of colonists would attempt to settle Corbos, each time being wiped out by Leviathans, leaving their disappearance a mystery to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="JA:L 2" />

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], an experimental mining colony<ref name="JA:L 1">[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 1]]</ref> of 793 miners and their families<ref name="JA:L 2" /> established [[Corbos Mining City]],<ref name="JA:L 1" /> but were also wiped out by Leviathans.<ref name="JA:L 2" /> In turn, a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ([[Kyp Durron]], [[Dorsk 82]], [[Streen]], and [[Kirana Ti]]) arrived on the world and put an end to their menace.<ref name="JA:L 4">[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 4|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 4]]</ref>

Several archaeological teams visited the planet in the following years, but they didn't report any Leviathans. Some of the creatures may have survived underground, but there was no proof. Regardless, colonists and miners continued to avoid the planet.<ref name="JvS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
